issues.description: Missing condition check for Leader type 'CP'. The card text states 'If your Leader's type includes "CP"' but the DSL has no condition. Should add condition: LeaderHasType:CP
TrashFromHand should be optional ("You may trash"). Current structure makes trashing mandatory before KO can occur. Should use optional:true or restructure logic.
KO target should specify 'up to 1' opponent character, but maxCost alone doesn't restrict count. Should include maxCount:1 parameter.
